emails.subject: The Countdown Continues
emails.body: The Countdown Continues Well, just mentioning the landmark levels now, we just hit 460...it's not impossible that we won't get 40 more in by the end of the year...

emails.subject: Re: The Countdown Continues
emails.body: Re: The Countdown Continues Yeah, yeah, yeah. How long have y'all been saying you were going to hit 500? I'm still holding at 3 with the possibility of getting 6 more signed by year end. Marie Heard Senior Legal Specialist Enron Broadband Services Phone: (713) 853-3907 Fax: (713) 646-8537 Marie_Heard@Enron.net Tana Jones@ECT 10/17/00 03:21 PM
